title: Crispy Cornmeal Crumble
description: A delicious Indian-inspired dessert featuring a crunchy cornmeal crumble topping, perfect for serving warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine cornmeal, melted buttery, and cozy (honey).
Add crunchy (chopped almonds) and crumble (chopped walnuts) to the mixture. Mix until crumbly.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
